query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contracts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  contractType ENUM('msa', 'sow', 'nda', 'employment', 'consulting', 'vendor', 'partnership', 'other') NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  contractorId INT,
  contractorBusinessId INT,
  clientEntityId INT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'pending_review', 'pending_signature', 'active', 'expired', 'terminated', 'renewed') DEFAULT 'draft',
  effectiveDate DATE,
  expirationDate DATE,
  autoRenew BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  renewalTermMonths INT DEFAULT 12,
  totalValue DECIMAL(14,2),
  paymentTerms VARCHAR(100),
  billingFrequency ENUM('one_time', 'weekly', 'bi_weekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'annually') DEFAULT 'monthly',
  retainerAmount DECIMAL(12,2),
  hourlyRate DECIMAL(10,2),
  terminationNoticeDays INT DEFAULT 30,
  nonCompeteMonths INT DEFAULT 0,
  ipAssignment BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  confidentialityRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  insuranceRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  insuranceMinimum DECIMAL(12,2),
  parentContractId INT,
  documentUrl VARCHAR(500),
  signedByContractor BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  signedByContractorAt DATETIME,
  signedByClient BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  signedByClientAt DATETIME,
  signedByClientName VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  createdBy INT,
  createdAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)

  totalValue DECIMAL(14,2),
  paymentTerms VARCHAR(100),
  billingFrequency ENUM('one_time', 'weekly', 'bi_weekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'annually') DEFAULT 'monthly',
  retainerAmount DECIMAL(12,2),
  hourlyRate DECIMAL(10,2),
  terminationNoticeDays INT DEFAULT 30,
  nonCompeteMonths INT DEFAULT 0,
  ipAssignment BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  confidentialityRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  insuranceRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  insuranceMinimum DECIMAL(12,2),
  parentContractId INT,
  documentUrl VARCHAR(500),
  signedByContractor BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
